arts.ttl: Anderlecht v Porto Preview | Mauves looking to keep good run going against out of form Porto
arts.sum: Anderlecht welcome Porto to Brussels in the Europa League on Thursday full of confidence. The side are unbeaten in five matches and have yet to lose in the competition this…

arts.ttl: Norwegian underdogs Bodo/Glimt have survived their dark days and are shining in Europe... now, after shocking Roma and Porto, they're relishing their 'special' Man United trip
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: When Havard Sakariassen talks about the dark days, he is referring to the tough times at Bodo/Glimt not the Norwegian winter when the sun doesn't rise for months.
